chooseThemeDesc: Pick a theme that feels like you. You can always change it later in Settings.
theme.previewDescription: Soft, romantic, playful, or elegant — choose the feeling you want every time you open the app.
theme.sampleBody: What is one little thing that made you feel loved recently?
